raw_consumer_statement:
To Whom It May Concern, I am submitting a formal complaint regarding an invalid credit card charge and subsequent collection activity for services that were never rendered. 

The charge, from XXXX, was applied to a corporate credit card issued through Citibank during my prior employment with XXXX. The reservation was canceled, and I never checked in or received any hotel services. In total, the disputed charges amount to {$370.00} corresponding to XX/XX/year> and XX/XX/year> from XXXX XXXX XXXX. 

I was unable to identify or dispute this charge at the time because my employment ended in XXXX, and my corporate email accountused for all billing notificationswas deactivated. As a result, I did not receive any statements or payment requests. 

I only became aware of the lack of payments on the card earlier this year when I was notified that the account had been closed and that payment was being pursued. 

Upon contacting XXXX, I was informed that although the stay did not occur, they would not correct the charge due to it falling in a prior fiscal year. This is not a valid justification for billing services that were never provided. 

The additional charge of {$990.00} corresponds to a corporate expense that was duly authorized by XXXX and internally expensed. XXXX should have paid that amount as I never had to personally pay for any bills on the corporates card. My XXXX XXXX is XXXX. 

This situation has now escalated to collection activity for a charge that is fundamentally invalid. 

Key issues : Charge for services not rendered ( no stay occurred ) Inability to dispute earlier due to loss of employer-controlled communication Refusal by XXXX to correct the error based on fiscal year reasoning Collection activity initiated on a disputed and invalid charge I am requesting : Immediate investigation of this billing error Removal of the invalid charge Cessation of all collection activity related to this matter Confirmation that no negative credit reporting will occur, or removal if already reported This is not a discretionary refund request. It is a dispute of a charge for services that were never provided. 

I am prepared to provide supporting documentation, including confirmation that no stay/check-in occurred. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
